title: Section 8
content: Subject to the provisions of this Act, the powers and duties of 1[the other officers of the University] the term for which they shall hold office, and the filling up of casual vacancies in such offices, shall be provided for by the Statutes.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 52 of 1966, s. 8, for "the officers of the University" (w.e.f. 31-12-1966).
